title: Creating an automation to move an item to another group or board based on the Summary of Subitems on the parent item (when all items are done)
excerpt: Hi!  I am trying to create an automation using the Parent summary field (roll-up from the sub-items).  When All sub-items are marked as done, I would like to move the entire item to a different group.  I could not find a…

posts.author: Kelly1 (Kelly Bellini)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I am trying to create an automation using the Parent summary field (roll-up from the sub-items). When All sub-items are marked as done, I would like to move the entire item to a different group. I could not find a recipe that allowed me to move the item to another group. Has anyone created one that I could use?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Kelly1

I recommend to use two custom automations for this

image1657×349 48.8 KB

The lower one set a status in the parent item when all subitems have a given status value (Done in this example). The top one moves the item to a specified group.

I tested this and it is working fine, although at this moment it is very slow (the item moves took over 2 minutes to complete)

posts.author: Kelly1 (Kelly Bellini)
posts.cookedHtml: thank you! I was not thinking about doing the double automation, but this works.

posts.author: reido (Reid Allen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bas, I can’t see a trigger option based on all subitems of an item. Has something changed that may have removed this option?

image1128×538 16.3 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
They are in the subitems category, see:

image2096×814 90.8 KB

posts.author: reido (Reid Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah yes! Thanks, Bas! Wow so fast too, I really appreciate your help.
